atum.menu.legal_settings.warning: You are using settings that are not allowed for Any% speedruns!
speedrunapi.config.atum.option.hotkeyOnl: If enabled, leaving the world normally will not cause a reset.
speedrunapi.config.atum.option.safeHotke: If enabled, the atum hotkey will not reset if pressed when a text field is focused.
speedrunapi.config.atum.option.illegalSe: Show a warning screen when exiting Atum configuration if using settings that are not allowed for Any% speedruns.
